mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50 percent of rate decline periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.5 percent, consumer spending growth stagnates and corporate earnings forecasts are downgraded, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 65 percent of instances where UNRATE crosses above 5.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in real personal income and housing starts signal synchronized consumer and construction demand, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when RSAFS and HOUST diverge in direction, or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant with p greater than 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices indicate expanding manufacturing capacity and supply chain utilization, which generates positive short-term S&P 500 momentum over the next week during economic expansions.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases coincide with negative 5-day forward returns in greater than 60 percent of observations during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month gains in total nonfarm payrolls reflect strengthening labor market conditions and rising wage income, which consistently predict positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Payroll growth shows zero predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 across all rolling 24-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index surpasses 240, inflation expectations force monetary authorities to tighten policy, raising discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally with positive 60-day returns in greater than 70 percent of periods following CPIAUCSL breaches above 240.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly GDP growth above trend and declining unemployment rates confirm broad-based economic strength, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined GDP and unemployment signal yields negative forward returns in greater than 55 percent of cases, or the interaction effect is indistinguishable from independent main effects.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production exceeding 0.5 percent signals immediate supply chain contraction and inventory drawdowns, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Negative 5-day forward returns occur in less than 40 percent of instances following a 0.5 percent industrial production drop.
